# Order m=5 root-leaf split — after insert(25).
# [10,20,25,30,40] overflows; mid = (M+1)/2 = 3 -> median K[3] = 25 is promoted
# into a new root, leaving [10,20] and [30,40] as the two leaves.
#
#              [ 25 ]
#             /      \
#        [10,20]   [30,40]
root 3
1  2  0  10 0  20 0
2  2  0  30 0  40 0
3  1  1  25 2
